headline: Lowe’s HomeCare Plus Tests Subscription Services For Stickier Customer Spending
summary: Lowe's Companies (NYSE:LOW) has launched HomeCare+, a new subscription service offering in-home maintenance for MyLowe's Rewards members. The service uses Lowe's associates to provide ongoing home maintenance visits, expanding the retailer's role beyond in-store product sales. HomeCare+ is designed to deepen customer loyalty by tying recurring services directly to the existing MyLowe's Rewards program. Lowe's Companies, traded on the NYSE under the ticker LOW, is best known for its big box...
